metadata.description: Prompt pairs for Factorized Diffusion VLM color perception testing. Each pair has a greyscale-style prompt and a color-style prompt for hybrid image generation.

easy.description: Greyscale and color prompts use entirely different subjects. Maximum structural divergence. Tests basic color vs. structure signal separation.

medium.description: Same broad category (both animals, both nature, both architecture) but different species or scenes. Moderate structural overlap. Tests mid-level color/structure disentanglement.

hard.description: Same or very similar subject in both prompts, one in greyscale style and one in vivid color. Near-identical structure. Model must rely almost entirely on color signal.
